title: cryptogramma jamesonii
intro: Cryptogramma jamesonii, also known as the rock braken fern, is a type of fern native to the mountainous regions of the Pacific Northwest in North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cryptogramma jamesonii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and injuries. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
